creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is the cutest hot chocolate I’ve ever had! 😘⛄️ 

The Snowman is a special edition hot chocolate drink created by @thedubailist in collaboration with @caffediromauae! We had it in JBR branch. So rich and creamy, and absolutely adorable! 

💸 28 AED 

Try it soon with your choco-lover besties! Tag them below.

transcription.text: I want you to know that I'm never leaving Cause I'm Mr. Snow, till death will be freezing Yeah, you are my home, my home for all seasons So come on and let's go
